title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: ipa-healthcheck bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for ipa-healthcheck is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10 Release Notes linked from the References section.
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian

fixes.description: ipa-healthcheck uses fips-mode-setup to determine FIPS state
Have ipa-healthcheck warn on expiring user-provided certificates
Fix the warning displayed on running ipa-healthcheck
IPAOpenSSLChainValidation changed behavior with ca-certificates update

full_text:
An update for ipa-healthcheck is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10 Release Notes linked from the References section.
